Operation 'seriesPing' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, not_actionable. Current description is identical to summary and lacks actionable detail. Enhanced description explains the operation's purpose (health check), expected behavior (returns success if operational), and practical use case (health monitoring). This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Performs a liveness check on the series API endpoint to verify service availability and connectivity. Returns a successful response if the service is operational. Useful for health monitoring and connection validation before executing time series queries.
data.reasoning: Current description is identical to summary and lacks actionable detail. Enhanced description explains the operation's purpose (health check), expected behavior (returns success if operational), and practical use case (health monitoring). This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'seriesLabels' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description lists operations but lacks clarity on return values and query modes. Enhanced description specifies what is returned (label metadata with names and values) and explicitly names the three supported query modes, making it clearer for AI agents to understand the operation's flexibility and determine which mode to use.

data.current_description: Performs label set lookup for series identifiers, lists all known label names, or finds all values for given label names.
data.description_suggestion: Performs label set lookup for series identifiers, lists all known label names, or finds all values for given label names. Returns label metadata including label names and their associated values. Supports three query modes: retrieve labels for specific series, enumerate all available labels, or filter by label name.
data.reasoning: Current description lists operations but lacks clarity on return values and query modes. Enhanced description specifies what is returned (label metadata with names and values) and explicitly names the three supported query modes, making it clearer for AI agents to understand the operation's flexibility and determine which mode to use.

message: Operation 'seriesSources' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about input expectations (one or more identifiers) and output format (mapping). Enhanced version clarifies the lookup relationship and purpose for AI agents.

data.current_description: Returns PMAPI context names for given source identifiers.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve PMAPI context names for series sources
data.description_suggestion: Returns PMAPI context names corresponding to the provided source identifiers. Accepts one or more source identifier parameters and returns a mapping of source identifiers to their associated PMAPI context names, enabling source-to-context resolution for time series data.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about input expectations (one or more identifiers) and output format (mapping). Enhanced version clarifies the lookup relationship and purpose for AI agents.

message: Operation 'seriesInstances' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too vague. Description is unclear about conditional behavior (with vs. without series identifiers). Enhanced version explicitly documents the two operational modes and their purposes for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns instance identifiers and names for series identifiers, or all known instance names.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve instance identifiers and names for series
data.description_suggestion: Returns instance identifiers and names associated with provided series identifiers. When series identifiers are supplied, returns instances for those specific series. When no series identifiers are provided, returns all known instance names across the system. Useful for discovering available instances and their relationships to series.
data.reasoning: Summary is too vague. Description is unclear about conditional behavior (with vs. without series identifiers). Enhanced version explicitly documents the two operational modes and their purposes for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'seriesLoad' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about parameters, return value, and important side effects (cache population, potential eviction). Enhanced version provides complete operational context for AI agents.

data.current_summary: Load time series data from source
data.current_description: Loads time series data from a specified source into the key-value server cache.
data.description_suggestion: Loads time series data from a specified source into the key-value server cache for improved query performance. Accepts source identifier and optional parameters. Returns confirmation of loaded data and cache status. This operation has side effects: it populates the cache and may evict existing entries if capacity limits are reached.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about parameters, return value, and important side effects (cache population, potential eviction). Enhanced version provides complete operational context for AI agents.

message: Operation 'searchSuggest' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks context about how suggestions are generated (prefix matching), input requirements, and use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the autocomplete nature and helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation.

data.current_description: Provides search query suggestions (metric and instance names).
data.summary_suggestion: Get search query suggestions for metrics and instances
data.description_suggestion: Provides autocomplete-style search query suggestions based on partial input. Returns matching metric names and instance names that begin with or contain the provided search prefix. Useful for interactive search interfaces and query refinement. Accepts search prefix and optional filtering parameters.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks context about how suggestions are generated (prefix matching), input requirements, and use cases. Enhanced version clarifies the autocomplete nature and helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation.

message: Operation 'searchIndom' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary uses domain abbreviation 'indom' without explanation. Description is vague about what 'entities' means and lacks input/output clarity. Enhanced version spells out 'instance domain', clarifies entity types, and explains the operation's exploratory purpose.

data.current_description: Returns all entities (instances, metrics) related to the given indom.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all metrics and instances for an instance domain
data.description_suggestion: Returns all metrics and instances associated with a specified instance domain (indom). Accepts an indom identifier and returns a comprehensive list of related entities including instance names and their associated metrics. Useful for exploring all performance data within a specific domain.
data.reasoning: Summary uses domain abbreviation 'indom' without explanation. Description is vague about what 'entities' means and lacks input/output clarity. Enhanced version spells out 'instance domain', clarifies entity types, and explains the operation's exploratory purpose.

message: Operation 'fetchMetrics' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_context. Description lacks clarity about the requirement for a context identifier and how to specify which metrics to fetch. Added context about the prerequisite createContext operation and clarified the relationship between InDom profiles and instance filtering for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Fetches current values for given metrics. Returns values for all instances unless an InDom profile has been set.
data.description_suggestion: Fetches current metric values for specified metrics within an established PMAPI context. Returns values for all instances by default, or filtered instances if an InDom profile has been set for the context. Requires a valid context identifier from a prior createContext call.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about the requirement for a context identifier and how to specify which metrics to fetch. Added context about the prerequisite createContext operation and clarified the relationship between InDom profiles and instance filtering for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getChildren' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Summary uses unexplained acronym 'PMNS' which may confuse AI agents unfamiliar with PCP terminology. Description lacks context about PMNS being a metric hierarchy and the use case for this operation. Improved summary expands acronym and description adds navigational context.

data.current_description: Returns the children (and their status) of a given PMNS node.
data.description_suggestion: Returns the child nodes and their status information from the Performance Metrics Namespace (PMNS) tree for a specified parent node. Useful for navigating the metric hierarchy and discovering available metrics.
data.reasoning: Summary uses unexplained acronym 'PMNS' which may confuse AI agents unfamiliar with PCP terminology. Description lacks context about PMNS being a metric hierarchy and the use case for this operation. Improved summary expands acronym and description adds navigational context.

message: Operation 'setProfile' has semantic quality issues: not_actionable, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary uses unexplained acronym 'InDom'. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes a profile input, what the operation returns, and the relationship to fetch operations. Improved version clarifies the filtering mechanism, input requirements, and output behavior for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Sets the InDom profile for a context, controlling which instances are returned by fetch.
data.description_suggestion: Configures an InDom (instance domain) profile for a specified PMAPI context to control which metric instances are returned by subsequent fetch operations. The profile filters instance results based on the provided instance domain specification. Returns confirmation of the profile configuration.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses unexplained acronym 'InDom'. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes a profile input, what the operation returns, and the relationship to fetch operations. Improved version clarifies the filtering mechanism, input requirements, and output behavior for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getIndom' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Summary is too generic and doesn't clarify what 'instance domain' means in PCP context. Description lacks information about what specific information is returned and the relationship to other operations like setProfile. Enhanced version provides domain context and operational relationships.

data.current_description: Returns instance domain information for a given metric.
data.description_suggestion: Returns instance domain (InDom) information for a specified metric, including available instances and their identifiers. This information is used to understand the structure of multi-valued metrics and to configure instance filtering via setProfile.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic and doesn't clarify what 'instance domain' means in PCP context. Description lacks information about what specific information is returned and the relationship to other operations like setProfile. Enhanced version provides domain context and operational relationships.

message: Operation 'storeValue' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary doesn't clarify the write/store distinction or the write-capability constraint. Description lacks critical input details (what parameters are needed), output information (what is returned), and side effects (state changes). Enhanced version specifies prerequisites, required inputs, return value, and potential side effects for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Stores a new value for a given metric (write-capable metrics only).
data.description_suggestion: Writes a new value to a specified write-capable metric within an established PMAPI context. Only metrics with write capability support this operation. Requires the metric identifier, instance identifier (if applicable), and the new value. Returns confirmation of the write operation. This operation modifies metric state and may trigger downstream effects depending on the metric's semantics.
data.reasoning: Summary doesn't clarify the write/store distinction or the write-capability constraint.
